items.title: Lebanon says three killed in Israeli strike on Beirut suburb
items.dek: Israel says it targeted the Iran-backed Hezbollah, as Tehran warns this could derail a US-Iran deal to end the fighting.
items.body: Israel says it targeted the Iran-backed Hezbollah, as Tehran warns this could derail a US-Iran deal to end the fighting.

items.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
items.dek: Japanese firms will spend billions on UK infrastructure and offshore wind, Downing Street says.
